title: guazuma invira
intro: Guazuma ulmifolia, commonly known as Guazuma invira, is a tropical plant species native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Guazuma invira include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. Guazuma invira can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and it's also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties.
